user_setup.description: Add exasol user to sudo group

setup.description: Configuring passwordless sudo on all nodes

tool_setup.description: Download c4 cluster management tool v4.28.5

ssh_setup.description: Generate SSH key pair for cluster communication

ssh_setup.command: sudo mkdir -p ~exasol/.ssh && echo 'ssh-rsa  ubuntu@ip-10-0-1-120' | sudo tee ~exasol/.ssh/authorized_keys > /dev/null && sudo chown -R exasol:exasol ~exasol/.ssh && sudo chmod 700 ~exasol/.ssh && sudo chmod 600 ~exasol/.ssh/authorized_keys
ssh_setup.description: Distribute ubuntu SSH key to exasol user

ssh_setup.command:
ssh-keyscan -H localhost >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null || true
ssh-keyscan -H 127.0.0.1 >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null || true
mkdir -p ~/.ssh
touch ~/.ssh/config
grep -q "Host localhost" ~/.ssh/config 2>/dev/null || cat >> ~/.ssh/config << 'SSHEOF'

Host localhost 127.0.0.1
    StrictHostKeyChecking no
    UserKnownHostsFile /dev/null
    LogLevel ERROR
SSHEOF
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/config
ssh_setup.description: Configure localhost SSH access to exasol user

ssh_setup.command: sudo -u exasol bash -c 'mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh && if [ ! -f ~/.ssh/id_rsa ]; then ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 2048 -f ~/.ssh/id_rsa -N "" -q; fi'
ssh_setup.description: Generate SSH key pair for exasol user

ssh_setup.command:
# Collect exasol public keys from all nodes, distribute to all authorized_keys
sudo cat ~exasol/.ssh/id_rsa.pub  # on each node
echo '<KEY>' | sudo tee -a ~exasol/.ssh/authorized_keys > /dev/null
sudo chown exasol:exasol ~exasol/.ssh/authorized_keys && sudo chmod 600 ~exasol/.ssh/authorized_keys
ssh_setup.description: Cross-distribute exasol SSH keys for cluster communication

ssh_setup.command:
sudo -u exasol bash -c '
mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh
touch ~/.ssh/config && chmod 600 ~/.ssh/config
grep -q "Host localhost" ~/.ssh/config 2>/dev/null || cat >> ~/.ssh/config << SSHEOF

Host localhost 127.0.0.1 <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP>
    StrictHostKeyChecking no
    UserKnownHostsFile /dev/null
    LogLevel ERROR
SSHEOF
'
ssh_setup.description: Configure exasol SSH config for cluster nodes

configuration.command:
echo "CCC_HOST_ADDRS=\"<PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP> <PRIVATE_IP>\"
CCC_HOST_EXTERNAL_ADDRS=\"<PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP> <PUBLIC_IP>\"
CCC_HOST_DATADISK=/dev/exasol.storage
CCC_HOST_IMAGE_USER=exasol
CCC_HOST_IMAGE_PASSWORD=<EXASOL_IMAGE_PASSWORD>
CCC_HOST_KEY_PAIR_FILE=id_rsa
CCC_PLAY_RESERVE_NODES=0
CCC_PLAY_WORKING_COPY=@exasol-2025.2.0
CCC_PLAY_DB_PASSWORD=<EXASOL_DB_PASSWORD>
CCC_PLAY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<EXASOL_ADMIN_PASSWORD>
CCC_PLAY_DB_MEM_SIZE=672000
CCC_ADMINUI_START_SERVER=true" | tee /tmp/exasol_c4.conf > /dev/null
configuration.description: Create c4 configuration file on remote system

cluster_management.description: Get cluster play ID for confd_client operations
